query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%Stellar%' OR name LIKE '%Passion%' OR name LIKE '%Valentine%' OR name LIKE '%Luxe%' OR name LIKE '%Night%' OR name LIKE '%Waters%' OR name LIKE '%Blaze%' OR name LIKE '%Phoenix%' OR name LIKE '%Vixen%' OR name LIKE '%Rose%' OR name = 'Ryan Connor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as test_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT name) as unique_names
FROM performers;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zFHT5FCru9ok1xS.cec69d91c8c2 --database dWUnvuCqdxwX7Y3rW9HJ6z --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%Stellar%' OR name LIKE '%Passion%' OR name LIKE '%Valentine%' OR name LIKE '%Luxe%' OR name LIKE '%Night%' OR name LIKE '%Waters%' OR name LIKE '%Blaze%' OR name LIKE '%Phoenix%' OR name LIKE '%Vixen%' OR name LIKE '%Rose%' OR name = 'Ryan Connor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as test_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT name) as unique_names
FROM performers;
